assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'The most common cause is pods that can't be evicted' and has a dedicated section on PodDisruptionBudgets as the first common blocking issue

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' command in multiple places

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple commands to identify blocking pods including 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running,status.phase!=Succeeded' and commands to check pods on specific nodes

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically address resource constraints, capacity issues, or pending pods as potential causes of the upgrade being stuck

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Response provides a kubectl patch command to temporarily adjust restrictive PDBs: 'kubectl patch pdb PDB_NAME -n NAMESPACE --type merge -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":0}}'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE's PDB timeout mechanism or automatic notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Response includes guidance on adjusting upgrade settings with max-surge and max-unavailable parameters in multiple places

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Response does not mention admission controllers or webhook issues as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring commands and suggests monitoring upgrade progress, though validation steps could be more explicit

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Response does not specifically mention POD_PDB_VIOLATION notifications or their availability through Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub
